summary: PR #2261 decompiled a batch of item-system functions across multiple item source files, updated related item attribute structs and prototypes, and added includes needed by recovered bodies. The PR body claims 20 item functions at 100% fuzzy match with a clean ninja build; the bot report lists 21 new matches, consisting of the 20 named functions plus an itgamewatchchef .sdata2 item, along with small data-section changes.

key_files.role: Updated item attribute and item-var field layouts used by recovered item functions: itKyasarinAttributes gains padding/x28/x2C, itHououAttr gains x10, and itMewtwoShadowball_ItemVars x4C changes from f32 to s32.
Recovered fn_80281734 and it_3F14_Logic7_EnteredAir with Item user_data, facing_dir checks, motion selection, JObj animation frame speed setup, and owner reset.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches for itdosei

key_files.role: Recovered itGamewatchchef_UnkMotion1_Anim lifeTimer decrement/expiry logic and alternating helper calls based on timer bit.
Recovered itHitodeman_UnkMotion2_Phys transition on it_8027A09C, including hitlag callback assignments.
Recovered itHouou_UnkMotion3_Phys and it_802D2F70; added mp/mplib.h include for mpLib_80054ED8/mpGetSpeed usage.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches for ithouou

key_files.role: Recovered four Kyasarin motion/collision functions using specialAttributes, velocity setup, facing_dir, position bounds, and Item_80268E5C transitions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches for itkyasarin

key_files.role: Recovered it_2725_Logic32_Spawned and it_2725_Logic33_Spawned; added ef/efsync.h include and used efSync_Spawn with PAD_STACK.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches for itmatadogas

key_files.role: Updated it_802CB798 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void it_802CB798(Item_GObj*).
Recovered itMewtwoshadowball_UnkMotion8_Phys and it_2725_Logic101_Reflected; added math.h and used cosf/sinf plus M_PI/M_TAU angle normalization loops.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches and .sdata2 improvement

key_files.role: Updated it_802C4D10 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void it_802C4D10(Item_GObj*).
Recovered itOldkuri_UnkMotion0_Phys and itOldkuri_UnkMotion1_Coll, including countdown/facing branch behavior and a PAD_STACK(8) collision helper shape.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report new matches and .sdata2 regression

key_files.role: Recovered itOldottosea_UnkMotion7_Anim with PAD_STACK(8), state reset, helper calls, and transition to motion 0.
Recovered it_802EC3F4 clearing velocity/nudge fields and a flag before transitioning motion and calling it_802EC9E8.
Recovered it_802E3400 setting item flags/state and transitioning to motion 0xA.
Updated it_802E3400 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void it_802E3400(Item_GObj*).
Recovered it_802DF9F8 clearing state, calling shell helpers, and transitioning to motion 0xA.
Updated it_802DF9F8 and it_802DFF14 prototypes from unknown signatures to typed Item_GObj*/s32 signatures.

what_changed: Replaced decomp placeholder comments with C bodies for the PR's named item functions across Dosei, Gamewatch Chef, Hitodeman, Houou, Kyasarin, Matadogas, Mewtwo Shadowball, Old Kuri, Old Ottosea, Tincle, Whitebea, and Z/G shell item files.

Updated item common structs to expose fields needed by the recovered code instead of leaving accesses as opaque layout gaps: Kyasarin boundary fields, Houou z-speed field, and Mewtwo Shadowball x4C integer counter/flag field.
Updated several headers to replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete function signatures after recovered bodies established argument and return types.
Added includes required by recovered calls: mp/mplib.h in ithouou.c, ef/efsync.h in itmatadogas.c, and math.h in itmewtwoshadowball.c.
The bot report recorded matched code progress of +2276 bytes and 21 new matches, while the human PR body scoped the function work as 20 item functions at fuzzy_match_percent 100.0.

smart_moves.text: Recovered shared item data layout alongside function bodies, allowing code to use typed struct fields such as attr->x10, attr->x28/x2C, and mewtwoshadowball.x4C instead of raw offset access.
Updated owning headers when helper signatures became clear from call sites and recovered bodies, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS surface.
Kept small matching tactics localized where present: PAD_STACK appears only in specific recovered functions that needed stack-shape control.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Item function matching often requires recovering adjacent ItemVars/article specialAttributes layout at the same time as the function body; typed fields can make recovered movement, timer, and boundary logic reviewable.
When a recovered item function calls a helper whose unknown prototype is in the item header, update the header signature rather than relying on local declarations or UNK_PARAMS.
Small stack-shape tactics such as PAD_STACK may appear in matched item functions, but this PR only supports treating them as narrow per-function tactics, not as broad style guidance.

naming_conventions.convention: Unproven item functions retained address-style or existing UnkMotion names such as fn_80281734, it_802D2F70, it_802DF9F8, and itKyasarin_UnkMotion*_Anim/Coll rather than inventing semantic names.
Recovered locals use established short item-system role names such as gobj, ip, jobj, attr, timer, scale, and sp10.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: recovered bodies in itdosei.c, ithouou.c, itkyasarin.c, itmatadogas.c

naming_conventions.convention: Newly exposed struct fields remain offset-style names such as x10, x28, x2C, and x4C when semantic meaning is not established by PR evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use PAD_STACK in narrow functions to preserve stack layout when recovering otherwise straightforward helper-call bodies.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR body reports clean ninja and 100% fuzzy match, but no per-function objdiff transcript is included in the loaded evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use math constants and functions directly for angle/velocity reconstruction in Mewtwo Shadowball: M_PI, M_TAU, cosf, and sinf.
Recover branch shapes around facing direction, timers, and flags with simple nested if/return forms rather than more abstract rewrites.
instances: fn_80281734 facing_dir and xDF8.x sign checks
itOldkuri_UnkMotion0_Phys facing_dir branch after xDF8 countdown

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Add only the includes needed by recovered calls instead of broad local declarations.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported matched code 55.94% (+0.06%, +2276 bytes), matched data 37.51% (+0.00%, +16 bytes), 21 new matches, one .sdata2 improvement in itmewtwoshadowball, and one .sdata2 regression in itoldkuri.
No human review comments or review records are present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching itKyasarinAttributes x28 x2C or replacing offset-style names with semantic names.
Find PRs that remove or justify PAD_STACK in itmatadogas, itoldkuri, or itoldottosea item functions.
Search later history for itMewtwoShadowball_ItemVars x4C type changes or semantic rename.
Search for subsequent data-section cleanup around itgamewatchchef .sdata2, itmewtwoshadowball .sdata2, and itoldkuri .sdata2 after PR #2261.
Find later PRs updating fn_80281734, it_802D2F70, it_802DF9F8, or it_802E3400 to semantic names.

evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: PR body with function list and verification claim
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for changed files
notes: Changed files and recovered code bodies are strongly evidenced by the loaded full diff and changed_files listing.

Verification is partially evidenced: the PR body claims clean ninja and fuzzy_match_percent 100.0 for all functions, and the bot report confirms 100% before/after rows for listed function matches; however, no raw build log or objdiff/checkdiff transcript is included.

The PR body says 20 item functions; the bot report says 21 new matches because it includes an additional itgamewatchchef .sdata2 entry. This intake treats the named function work as 20 functions and records the bot's data item separately.
There are no loaded human review comments, so reviewer intent and requested changes cannot be inferred.
Some code appears generated with Claude Code per the PR body footer; this is evidence about authorship tooling, not evidence that any unusual source form is globally acceptable.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Item matching may require concurrent ItemVars/article attribute layout recovery
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2261, several item matches depended on exposing typed fields in itCommonItems.h and then using them in recovered item bodies, including Kyasarin boundary fields, Houou attr->x10, and Mewtwo Shadowball x4C as s32.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered item helper signatures should be reflected in owning headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2261 updated item headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures after recovering or using corresponding functions, including it_802CB798, it_802C4D10, it_802E3400, it_802DF9F8, and it_802DFF14.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PAD_STACK appeared as a narrow item-function matching tactic
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2261 used PAD_STACK only in specific recovered item functions, with reported 100% fuzzy matches. This supports indexing PAD_STACK as a narrow matching tactic in this PR, not a general source-style recommendation.

source_update_candidates.title: Item function matches often touch src/melee/it/itCommonItems.h
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2261 matched item functions across src/melee/it/items and updated src/melee/it/itCommonItems.h to expose item attribute and item-var fields needed by those bodies.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoped fact for future item decomp work; should be curated rather than accepted directly from one PR.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify that PAD_STACK evidence should include data-section side effects when reports show .sdata2 movement
source_update_candidates.text: This PR used PAD_STACK in several matched item functions and the bot report also showed small .sdata2 changes, including one improvement and one regression. Existing standards already require evidence for matching tactics; curator may consider adding a reminder to inspect section-report side effects when stack tactics and data-section changes appear together.
source_update_candidates.reason: The evidence suggests a review/search reminder, but not enough to establish a new global rule.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's 'all 100% match' line as standalone validation beyond this PR; loaded evidence lacks raw objdiff/checkdiff logs.
Do not infer semantic meanings for x10, x28, x2C, x4C, or address-style function names; the PR keeps offset/address-style names.
Do not treat PAD_STACK or UNUSED padding as preferred style; the PR only supports them as localized matching tactics with limited evidence.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale or requested changes; no human review comments were loaded.
